data.body:
## Bug Description

The /dso:onboarding skill fails to find detection scripts (project-detect.sh, detect-stack.sh) when invoked in a host project that uses the plugin cache (.claude/plugins/marketplaces/digital-service-orchestra/). The dso shim at .claude/scripts/dso resolves plugin_root from dso-config.conf, but when onboarding runs in a fresh project, the shim cannot locate the scripts.

## Observed Output

```
bash "$REPO_ROOT/.claude/scripts/dso" project-detect.sh "$REPO_ROOT" 2>/dev/null || echo "Detection script not available"
→ Detection script not available

bash "$REPO_ROOT/.claude/scripts/dso" detect-stack.sh "$REPO_ROOT" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown"
→ unknown
```

## Expected Behavior

The dso shim should resolve plugin_root to the marketplace cache path (.claude/plugins/marketplaces/digital-service-orchestra/plugins/dso) and find detection scripts there.

## Likely Root Cause

The dso shim reads dso.plugin_root from .claude/dso-config.conf, but this config key may not be set during initial onboarding (chicken-and-egg: onboarding creates the config, but needs the scripts to detect the project). The shim fallback (plugins/dso relative to repo root) doesn't match the marketplace cache path.
